title: Reimagining the mouse pointer with AI
summary: Google DeepMind has developed an AI-powered mouse pointer that can understand what it is pointing at and provide contextual information about why it matters. The project reimagines a fundamental computer interface element that has remained largely unchanged for over 50 years by adding intelligent capabilities.
